app.title: Nothing Ever Happens: Polymarket bot that always buys No on non-sports markets
app.author: m-hodges
app.description: A bot that always buys 'No' on Polymarket for non-sports markets.
proposed_tests: Run the bot on a Polymarket market and verify the results
Compare the outcome with a random or informed No buyer
Check the reliability of the bot on different non-sports markets
Run the bot on a test market to check the stability and robustness
